포장: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '포장' appears in the context of food, meals, luggage, or everyday physical objects, translate as 'packing' or 'wrapping', NEVER 'pavement'.)
노상: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '노상' refers to street vendors, outdoors, or public spaces, translate according to conversational context, NEVER 'subgrade'.)
기층: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '기층' refers to social classes, public grassroots, or politics, translate as 'grassroots', NEVER 'base course'.)
표층: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '표층' is used abstractly to mean superficial or surface-level, translate as 'superficial', NEVER 'surface course'.)
줄눈: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '줄눈' refers to interior bathroom tiles or everyday home repair, translate as 'grout', not pavement 'joint'.)
실: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '실' is used as a room (e.g., 화장실) or sewing thread, translate as 'room' or 'thread', NEVER 'seal'.)
선형: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '선형' refers to linear algebra or a person's body shape, translate as 'linear' or 'body line', NEVER 'alignment'.)
배치: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '배치' means arranging furniture or deploying personnel, translate as 'arrangement' or 'deployment', NEVER 'batch'.)
식: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '식' refers to a meal (식사) or ceremony, translate accordingly, NEVER as 'method' or 'type'.)
팻치: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '팻치' refers to a medical patch or bandage, translate as 'medical patch', NEVER 'pavement patch'.)
Plant: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'Plant' refers to botany, flora, or gardening, translate as '식물', NEVER '아스팔트 플랜트/공장'.)
Binder: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'Binder' refers to office stationery or a folder, translate as '서류철/바인더', NEVER '결합재'.)
Course: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'Course' refers to a meal course, golf, or a university class, translate contextually, NEVER '포장층'.)
Base: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'Base' refers to a military base or a musical bass instrument, translate contextually, NEVER '기층'.)
Grade: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'Grade' refers to a student's school grade or general quality, translate as '학년/성적', NEVER '경사도/입도'.)
Joint: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'Joint' refers to a human body part (관절), marijuana, or a bar, translate contextually, NEVER '줄눈/접합부'.)
Seal: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'Seal' refers to the marine animal or a stamped seal/sticker, translate as '바다표범/도장', NEVER '실 코트'.)
Shoulder: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'Shoulder' refers to the human body part, translate as '어깨', NEVER '길어깨/노견'.)
Patch: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'Patch' refers to software updates or clothing, translate as '업데이트 패치/헝겊', NEVER '팻치(포장수수)'.)
Yield: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'Yield' refers to agricultural crop output or surrendering in a war, translate as '수확량/항복', NEVER '항복강도'.)
基層: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '基層' refers to social grassroots or local citizens, translate as 'grassroots', NEVER 'base course'.)
路床: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '路床' refers to a sickbed or is used metaphorically for sickness, translate contextually, NEVER 'subgrade'.)
プラント: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'プラント' refers to interior houseplants or gardening, translate as 'houseplant', NEVER 'asphalt plant'.)
バインダー: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'バインダー' refers to office supplies/stationery, translate as 'stationery binder', NEVER 'binder(asphalt)'.)
ジョイント: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'ジョイント' refers to a joint venture or collaboration, translate as 'collaboration', NEVER 'pavement joint'.)
シール: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'シール' refers to a child's toy sticker or stationary, translate as 'sticker', NEVER 'pavement seal'.)
コース: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'コース' refers to a dining course or sports route, translate contextually, NEVER 'pavement course/layer'.)
ベース: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'ベース' refers to bass guitar or a military base, translate contextually, NEVER 'base course'.)
バッチ: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'バッチ' refers to a wearable badge/pin, translate as 'badge', NEVER 'batch'.)
パッチ: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If 'パッチ' refers to winter underwear or a software patch, translate contextually, NEVER 'pavement patch'.)
基层: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '基层' refers to local grassroots organizations or ordinary people, translate as 'grassroots level', NEVER 'base course'.)
面层: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '面层' refers to facial surface or superficial aspects, translate contextually, NEVER 'surface course'.)
厂: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '厂' refers to a general open place or unrelated factory, translate as 'factory/place', NEVER 'asphalt plant'.)
结合料: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '结合料' refers to everyday glue or cohesive material, translate as 'glue/adhesive', NEVER 'binder'.)
垫层: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '垫层' refers to mattresses, bedding, or diapers, translate as 'bedding/diaper', NEVER 'cushion course'.)
密封: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '密封' refers to keeping a secret or sealing a letter, translate as 'keep secret/sealed', NEVER 'pavement seal'.)
混合料: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '混合料' refers to food ingredients or mixed drinks, translate as 'mixed ingredients', NEVER 'asphalt mixture'.)
缝: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '缝' refers to a seam in clothing or a minor crack in an object, translate as 'seam/crack', NEVER 'pavement joint'.)
路线: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '路线' refers to a political line or travel itinerary, translate as 'political line/itinerary', NEVER 'alignment'.)
等级: (CRITICAL EXCEPTION: If '等级' refers to social status or VIP membership levels, translate as 'social class/status', NEVER 'grade'.)
